allow: Bash(gh pr create --repo contatop12/lorena-capi --base main --head prep-cloudflare-deploy --title 'Fix Cloudflare Workers deploy: align worker name and KV namespace' --body ' *)

PowerShell(@\("$env:ProgramFiles\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe","$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe","$env:USERPROFILE\\scoop\\apps\\gh\\current\\bin\\gh.exe","$env:USERPROFILE\\AppData\\Local\\Microsoft\\WinGet\\Packages"\) | ForEach-Object { if \(Test-Path $_\) { $_ } }; Get-ChildItem "$env:USERPROFILE\\AppData\\Local\\Microsoft\\WinGet\\Packages" -Filter "gh.exe" -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty FullName -First 3)
